features.name: signed variable shift left with double negation
features.description: Code should include a signed value shifted left by a variable shift amount with double negation applied

features.name: signed input with hex-based range declaration
features.description: Code should include a signed input wire with non-standard hex-based range bounds
features.snippet:
input wire signed [(5'h15):(1'h0)] wire3;
input wire signed [(2'h3):(1'h0)] wire2;

features.name: shift result sign-extension with alumacc
features.description: Code should include a shift-left operation result feeding into sign-extension logic with alumacc optimization
